However, since I found the plant 'Tonka bean' (Dipteryx odorata), I will write the paragraph based on this information:

The Tonka bean, also known as Dipteryx odorata, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. The Tonka bean has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation due to its sedative effects. The bioactive constituents of the Tonka bean include coumarins, such as tonka bean coumarin and isoflavones. The Tonka bean is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, particularly in traditional medicine in South America.
